text.title: Stakeholder Walkthrough Script Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding Stakeholder Walkthrough Script. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Walkthrough opens with the decision-ask stated as a single sentence in the first 5 minutes; meetings that drift into demo-mode are halted by the facilitator.
rule.rationale: Decision-ask first prevents the demo-mode 'pretty pictures' trap that produces compliments instead of decisions.

rule.statement: Designer presents 2-3 options at comparable fidelity with explicit trade-offs; presenting a single 'finished' artefact is rejected.
rule.rationale: Single artefact triggers polite agreement; options force trade-off thinking and produce real signal.

rule.statement: Walkthrough closes with a signed-decision line stated verbally and captured in design-decision-log; walkthroughs without a signed decision count as failed.
rule.rationale: Without a captured decision, the same walkthrough recurs in 2 weeks; the signed line ends the loop.

rule.statement: Off-scope ideas are PARKED using scope-creep-park-list-template; mid-meeting debate is halted by the facilitator.
rule.rationale: Parking ritual preserves stakeholder trust without expanding scope.

rule.statement: Final 10 minutes are reserved for recap: decision + parked items + revisit-gates. Skipping recap is rejected.
rule.rationale: Recap converts verbal agreement into a captured artefact; without it the decision evaporates.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do NOT run this methodology — emit a skip-record naming the failed precondition and route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above for flat methodologies), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-stakeholder-walkthrough-script.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
